prerequisites.value: Nature Soul, character level 4th, must not have an animal companion or mount that advances as an animal companion.

description.value: **Benefit:** You gain an animal companion as if you were a druid of your character level â3 from the following list: badger, bird, camel, cat (small), dire rat, dog, horse, pony, snake ( viper ), or wolf. If you later gain an animal companion through another source (such as the Animal domain, divine bond, hunter’s bond, mount, or nature bond class features), the effective druid level granted by this feat stacks with that granted by other sources.
